title: hydrangea hortensis var. mariesii
intro: Hydrangea hortensis var. mariesii, also known as the Mariesii Hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Mariesii Hydrangea has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Hydrangea hortensis var. mariesii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
